prompt_template: Smooth 3D abstract [form]. Soft, glowing lighting with subsurface scattering. Minimalist modern aesthetic, clean curves. Colors: [color_palette].

customizable_elements.form: rolling dunes, fluid waves, or soft geometric hills
customizable_elements.color_palette: Primary hex #258651, smoothly blended with radiant light greens and deep, rich dark green tones for high contrast and depth

quality_modifiers: 8k resolution, flawless render, high fidelity, ultra-clean composition, cinematic lighting

overrides.color_palette: Deep navy #0a192f to bright cyan #64ffda, with luminous highlights
Warm coral #ff7e5f to soft peach #ffecd2, with a golden glow
Matte black #1a1a1a to soft grey #b3b3b3, with striking rim lighting
